hypothesis: Tune Tweedie variance power to 1.2 (from 1.5) and num_leaves to 255 with learning_rate reduced to 0.03. Top M5 solutions suggest lower Tweedie power (1.1-1.3) works better for retail sales with many zeros. num_leaves=255 provides finer splits than 256 (odd number avoids symmetric tree bias). All other features match best run (exp_0070, WRMSSE=0.94499).
